arts.ttl: Arsenal fan's hilarious words of encouragement to Declan Rice do the trick as Alan Shearer hails Gunners midfielder's superb free-kick against Real Madrid
arts.sum: Rice broke the deadlock of a tense game at the Emirates on Tuesday night as he fired in a curling free-kick from distance past the helpless Thibaut Courtois.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid have request for Martin Odegaard purchase blocked
arts.sum: It has been revealed that Real Madrid tried to buy Arsenal skipper Martin Odegaard's shirt to showcase in their museum. Despite the Gunners star not having an illustrious career with Real, the Spanish club still wanted to have Odegaard's shirt in their museum.

arts.ttl: Two Real Madrid stars widely praised for performances vs Arsenal
arts.sum: Two leading members of the first-team setup at La Liga giants Real Madrid have on Tuesday evening come in for widespread praise online. This comes owing to their respective performances,…

arts.ttl: Thierry Henry reveals his pre-match message to Kylian Mbappé before Arsenal vs Real Madrid
arts.sum: Former Arsenal and Barcelona star Thierry Henry has provided an insight into the details of his pre-match discussion with Real Madrid frontman Kylian Mbappé. This of course comes with Real…

arts.ttl: UEFA penalty decision explained in Arsenal vs Real Madrid with clear referee verdict
arts.sum: Former Premier League referee Mark Clattenburg has agreed with video assistant referee's (VAR) decision not to award Arsenal a penalty in their Champions League quarter-final first-leg tie with Real Madrid. Clattenburg, who joined Amazon Prime Video's live broadcast of the game, was on hand to explain why the VAR had taken so long to come to a decision with UEFA's regulations different to the Premier League.

arts.ttl: What Thierry Henry said to Kylian Mbappe ahead of Arsenal vs Real Madrid Champions League clash
arts.sum: Arsenal legend Thierry Henry is at the Emirates Stadium this evening for the Champions League showdown against Real Madrid. Arsenal and Real Madrid last clashed in the Champions League during the 2005/06 season, with the Gunners coming out on top in the round of 16 tie on their way to reaching the final in Paris.

arts.ttl: Fans all saying the same thing about Arsenal pre-match display ahead of huge Champions League tie against Real Madrid
arts.sum: Football fans were quick to express their thoughts on Arsenal 's pre-match light show ahead of the Gunners' Champions League tie against Real Madrid at Emirates Stadium on Tuesday night.

arts.ttl: Arsenal forced to chase Nico Williams as PRIORITY plan revealed
arts.sum: Leroy Sane is currently focused on signing a new contract with Bayern Munich, despite holding fresh talks with Arsenal in recent weeks. Arsenal forced to chase Nico Williams as PRIORITY plan revealed

arts.ttl: Luka Modric targeted by surprise club over summer free transfer
arts.sum: Qatar want to sign Luka Modric at the end of his Real Madrid contract this summer to help bolster the prestige of their Stars League.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid confirmed team vs Arsenal as Spanish club make bold statement for Champions League tie
arts.sum: Real Madrid have already confirmed their team to take on Arsenal in the first leg of their Champions League quarter-final tie on Tuesday evening. Team news was published on Real Madrid's X account at 5:36pm, with Mikel Arteta Arsenal's team not expected to be confirmed until after 6:45pm .
